title: Column-level SAP governance tags sync into Unity Catalog
body: Column-level personal data governance tags from SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) now sync into Unity Catalog, including `fieldSemantics`, `isPotentiallyPersonal`, and `isPotentiallySensitive`. Use these tags in attribute-based access control (ABAC) policies to govern access to sensitive columns. See [SAP BDC semantic metadata](/aws/en/opensharing/sap-bdc/semantic-metadata).
